ab: Hmuya ka karac saya?
en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: Mskuy hari ka karac, mahi ou hari mtilux oyu.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: Hmuya ka karac saya?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Mtilux hari ka karac, mahi ou hari qsiya.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: Hmuya ka karac nganguc?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Beyhing ka hidaw, qlahang hndawan hidaw.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: Hmuya ka karac nganguc?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Ou bay rulung, uka hidaw ka karac.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: Mphuya ka karac kusun?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: So bay mosa uka hidaw ka kusun, ou bay rulung, sbwihur beyhing bay.
ch: B:明天好像沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: Hmuya ka karac diyax mmosa ta rmiwaw cida?
ch: A:我們出遊那天天氣如何?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: So bay mpskuy hari ka diyax cida, mlatac nganguc u kasi ka mlukus lukus oba.
ch: B:那天好像有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: Mphuya ka karac diyax sngayan?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: Ya bay mosa mdungus ka karac diyax sngayan cida.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: Mpquyux ka karac diyax mmosa ta rmiwaw cida hu?
ch: A:我們出遊那天會下雨嗎?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Mpsuwan ka karac cida, ya bay uxay mpquyux.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，應該不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: Mpquyux ka diyax mmosa ta rmiwaw cida hu?
ch: A:我們出遊那天會下雨嗎?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Iyaq, ya bay mpquyux ka diyax cida.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: Wa qmuyux ka saya hu?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Msuwan da, cnbu hidaw da.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: Wa qmuyux ka saya hu?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Qmuyux da, ini ku adas trasi ka yaku.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: Wa qmuyux ka nganguc hu?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: Ini quyux ka saya, ya bay mpquyux ka babaw cka hidaw, musa nganguc pa adas trasi.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後可能會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: Mpkskuy bay ka misan kawas hu?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: Iyaq, ya bay mosa mskuy bay ka misan kawas, plkusi ou hari lukus.
ch: B:是，明年冬天應該會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: Mosa mtilux bay ka rbawan kawas ni hu?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: Ya bay mosa mtilux bay ka rbawan, kou hari nmahan qsiya.
ch: B:夏天可能會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: Snkuxul su srwasaw hu?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: Snkuxul ku srwasaw, muxul bay ka karac.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: Snkuxul su krpuhan hu?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: Ini ku hari skuxul krpuhan, ou bay sbwihur beyhing ka krpuhan.
ch: B:我不太喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
